# POST /api/v1/files/upload-token

**Issue Upload Token**

إصدار رمز رفع الملف

Operation ID: `issueUploadToken`

**Authentication**

Required (Bearer Authentication).

## Request Body

Schema: `FileUploadTokenRequest` (application/json)

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description | Example |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| ownerId | integer (int64) | Yes |  | Owning record ID - معرف السجل المالك | 1001 |
| ownerType | string | Yes | maxLength: 100 | Owning record type - نوع السجل المالك | PURCHASE_ORDER |
| moduleCode | string | Yes | maxLength: 20 | Requesting module code - رمز الوحدة الطالبة | PRC |
| fileCategoryFk | integer (int64) | Yes |  | File category ID - معرف تصنيف الملف | 3 |

**Request Example**

```json
{
  "ownerId": 1001,
  "ownerType": "PURCHASE_ORDER",
  "moduleCode": "PRC",
  "fileCategoryFk": 3
}
```

## Response `200` — OK

Shape: `FileUploadTokenResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| encryptedToken | string | No |  | Encrypted, single-use upload token - رمز الرفع المشفر أحادي الاستخدام |
| expiresAt | string (date-time) | No |  | Token expiry timestamp - وقت انتهاء صلاحية الرمز |

## Other Possible Responses

Structurally guaranteed by this endpoint's own shape (auth requirement, permission check, request body) combined with the shared framework's exception handling — not specific business errors.

| HTTP Status | Code | Why |
|---|---|---|
| UNAUTHORIZED | UNAUTHORIZED | Endpoint requires authentication (global security requirement); GlobalExceptionHandler maps AuthenticationException to this status for every such endpoint. |
| BAD_REQUEST | INVALID_JSON | Endpoint accepts a JSON request body; GlobalExceptionHandler maps HttpMessageNotReadableException (malformed JSON) to this status for any @RequestBody, unconditionally. |
